message:
"PlayOnLinux is not all that good in a lot of cases" This is true. I've actually found that Lutris (www.lutris.net) is much better than PlayOnLinux because people are actively working on scripts--think the AUR for games. It's so good I was playing Overwatch and was able to get DOOM 2016 to at least start.

The rest of your article is on par with how modern Linux is. I dislike just how fragmented the community is because you do have some programs that are built for a specific distro family (.deb, .rpm). This will be fixed with AppImage and FlatPak I hope.
